rules: qualification never promotes design identity or public claims
approval binds an exact candidate alternative design and qualification fingerprint
approved applicability requires exact mods plus a machine-readable structural envelope with positive and negative examples
quarantine and demotion never silently delete or rename a released technology
released identity changes require a TechnologyMigration record
candidate and qualification catalogs are context-owned and non-publishing
the schema-2 shadow catalog exists before current selection is bound and has no mutation authority
every selectable alternative has an exact qualification and rejected alternatives cannot be selected
promotion admission requires a passing exact quality assessment, approval, applicability envelope, evidence, identity edge, and migration policy
offline governance records use canonical SHA-256 transport fingerprints
